name: Thalaivettiyaan Paalayam
overview: Siddharth, a resident of City, is the new Panchayat Secretary of Thalaivettiyaan Paalayam. His sudden village life, panchayat work and the people he meets in it do not lack comedy

trailers.title: Thalaivettiyaan Paalayam - Official Trailer | Prime Video India
